title: inheritance
text: inheritance The process by which objects at a higher level of abstraction, such as modeled entities, are used when defining objects at a lower level of abstraction, such as on subtype entities and derived component entities. For example, subtype entities inherit from modeled entities, so if a change is made in the modeled entity, it is inherited by the subtype. Related Links Inheritance In Uniface, inheritance is a mechanism in which definitions in one development object are applied to other objects that re-use the definition. This makes it possible to define common behavior in one place instead of everywhere that it is used, making it much easier to maintain the application. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
